STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WINE_FOX_STRIKE.title: Strike
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WINE_FOX_DEFEND.title: Defend
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BASIC_MINE.title: Basic Mining
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_PICKAXE.title: Stone Pickaxe
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_PICKAXE.descrip:
{IfUpgraded:show:Immediately gain {WoodPower:diff()} [gold]Plank[/gold] and {StonePower:diff()} [gold]Cobblestone[/gold].
|}At the start of each turn, gain [blue]{Digging:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Plank[/gold] and [blue]{Digging:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Cobblestone[/gold].{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BASIC_CRAFT.title: Basic Crafting
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FULL_ATTACK.title: Full Barrage
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FULL_ATTACK.descripti:
Spend all [gold]Materials[/gold].
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to a chosen enemy.
+{ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for each Material spent.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MINING_GEMS.title: Mining Gems
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PLANT_TREES.title: Plant Trees
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PLANT_TREES.descripti: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. At the start of next turn, gain [blue]{Plant:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Plank[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STEAM_ENGINE.title: Steam Engine
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STEAM_ENGINE.descript: At the start of each turn, gain {Steam:diff()} [gold]Stress[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_SWORD.title: Stone Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_ARMOR.title: Iron Armor
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_ARMOR.descriptio: Gain {Armor:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold]. Your [gold]Plating[/gold] stacks do not decrease.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PRESS_W_TO_THINK_CHOO: Choose a card to add to your hand
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MECHANICAL_DRILL.desc: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits} times. Gain {Iron:diff()} [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold]. If [gold]Stress[/gold] was spent, refund {Energy:energyIcons()}.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WOODEN_SWORD.title: Wooden Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_PICKAXE.title: Iron Pickaxe
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_PICKAXE.descript: For the next {Times:diff()} times you gain resources, gain 3 additional [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold].{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_SWORD.title: Diamond Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_SWORD.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Each turn, the first {Echoes:diff()} [gold]Attack[/gold] cards are played an additional time.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MECHANICAL_SAW.title: Mechanical Saw
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MECHANICAL_SAW.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Spend 1 [gold]Stress[/gold] to deal {BonusDamage:diff()} additional damage.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_SWORD.title: Iron Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_SWORD.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next {Echoes:diff()} [gold]Attack[/gold] cards are played an additional time.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ALTER_PATH.title: Another Way
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ALTER_PATH.descriptio: Spend {SelectCount:diff()} [gold]Plank[/gold]. Gain {Block:diff()} Block and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_ARMOR.title: Stone Brick Armor
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONE_ARMOR.descripti: Gain {Armor:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold]. At the start of each turn, lose 1 Dexterity.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_POWER_UP.title: Shift, Accelerate, Take Off
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_IRON_ZOMBIE.title: "White Zombie"
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CRUSHING_WHEEL.title: Crushing Wheel Array
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CRUSHING_WHEEL.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. This card costs 1 less for each time you spent [gold]Materials[/gold] this turn.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ENMERGENCY_REPAIR.des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, gain {Block:diff()} Block, and at the start of next turn gain 2 [gold]Stress[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LIGHT_ASSAULT.title: Light Assault
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LIGHT_ASSAULT.descrip: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. This card deals 1 less damage for every 2 [gold]Materials[/gold] you have.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EASY_PEASY.title: Easy Peasy
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EASY_PEASY.descriptio:
At the start of each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {EasyPeasy:diff()} additional cards.
At the start of each turn, add 1 [gold]Dazed[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold]; it gains 1 more each turn.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ALL_ITEM.title: All-Item Warehouse
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ALL_ITEM.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Gain {Wood:diff()} [gold]Plank[/gold], {Stone:diff()} [gold]Cobblestone[/gold], {Iron:diff()} [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold], and {Diamond:diff()} [gold]Diamond[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LESS_HOLIDAY.descript: [gold]Choose[/gold] up to {SelectCount:diff()} cards in your hand to [gold]change[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Work Overtime+|Work Overtime}[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WORK_WORK.title: Work Overtime
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_ALTERNATOR.title: Alternator
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_NOTHING.title: Bare-Handed Strike
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WOODEN_PICKAXE.title: Wooden Pickaxe
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WOODEN_PICKAXE.descri: At the start of next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WOODEN_ARMOR.title: Wooden Armor
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_NETHERITE_PICKAXE.des: Each time you play 2 cards in the same turn, gain 1 [gold]Plank[/gold], [gold]Cobblestone[/gold], [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold], and [gold]Diamond[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_COBBLESTONE_GENERATOR: At the start of your turn, gain 2 [gold]Cobblestone[/gold]; this amount increases by 2 each turn.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SHIELD_ATTACK.title: Shield Bash
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SHIELD_ATTACK.descrip:
Deal damage to all enemies equal to {BlockMultiplier:diff()} times your current [gold]Block[/gold].{InCombat:
(Deals {TotalDamage:diff()} damage)|}
Clear all your [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SPINNING_HAND.title: Spinning Hand
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SPINNING_HAND.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. This card costs 1 less for each time you [gold]Craft[/gold] this combat.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PRODUCTION_DOCUMENT.d: Cards you temporarily add during combat gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_RECORD_PLAYER.title: Record Player
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MILK.title: Milk
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_VACANT_DOMAIN.title: Vacant Domain
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PRESS_W_TO_THINK.desc: Look at the top 3 cards of your draw pile. Choose 1 to add to your hand; it gains Replay and Exhaust.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BACKUP_CRAFTING.title: Backup Workbench
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_TRADITIONALIST.title: Traditionalist
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DRIPSTONE_TRAP.title: Dripstone Trap
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DRIPSTONE_TRAP.descri: Spend all [gold]Cobblestone[/gold]. For each spent, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy and apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PRE_PROCESSING.title: Preprocessing
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WORKBENCH_BACKPACK.de:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]Craft[/gold].
Reduce this card's cost by 1.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_REGROUP.title: Regroup
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_REGROUP.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Put 1 card from your discard pile into your hand.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_REGROUP_CHOOSE: Choose a card from your discard pile to add to your hand
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CHANGE_EQUIPMENT.desc: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards, then choose {Cards:diff()} cards in your hand to shuffle into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CHANGE_EQUIPMENT_CHOO: Choose {Amount} cards to shuffle into your draw pile
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_ARMOR.title: Diamond Armor
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_ARMOR.descrip: Gain {Armor:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold]. If you still have [gold]Plating[/gold] at the end of the turn, retain your Block for this turn.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FOX_BITE.title: Fox Bite
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MAID_SUPPORT.title: Maid's Support
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FORGING.title: Forging
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EQUIVALENT_EXCHANGE.d:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] any card from your hand. Gain resources based on that card's tier.{IfUpgraded:show:
If the exhausted card was Upgraded, double the resources gained.|}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_QUICK_SHELTER.title: Quick Shelter
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_QUICK_SHELTER.descrip: Gain {Wood:diff()} [gold]Plank[/gold] and {Stone:diff()} [gold]Cobblestone[/gold]. Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BLUEPRINT_PRINTING.de: Spend 5 [gold]Plank[/gold] and 5 [gold]Cobblestone[/gold]. Choose 1 card in your hand; add {Cards:diff()} copies to your hand that cost 1 less, have [gold]Retain[/gold], and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STRESS_RESPONSE.title: Stress Response
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STRESS_RESPONSE.descr: Lose 6 HP. Gain 1 Max HP, {Energy:diff()} Energy, and draw 2 cards.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MASS_PRODUCTION.title: Mass Production
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MASS_PRODUCTION.descr: When you [gold]Craft[/gold] this turn, give each teammate 1 copy of the crafted card.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HELL_GIFT.title: Hell's Gift
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HELL_GIFT.description: Add a random [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Upgraded |}[/gold]golden equipment card to your [gold]hand[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GOLDEN_SWORD.title: Golden Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GOLDEN_SWORD.descript: Every 2 [gold]Attack[/gold] cards you play, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}{IfUpgraded:show:|. All [gold]Attack[/gold] cards gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold].}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SNOW_BALL_OVERWHELMIN:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage{IfUpgraded:show: twice|}.
The next [gold]Skill[/gold] you play this turn costs 0.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_PICKAXE.title: Diamond Pickaxe
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_DIAMOND_PICKAXE.descr:
Every card you craft is Upgraded.[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:
Craft.|}[/gold]{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GOLDEN_PICKAXE.title: Golden Pickaxe
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GOLDEN_PICKAXE.descri: Whenever you gain Materials, gain that much [gold]Block[/gold] and deal damage to a random enemy equal to {IfUpgraded:show:3|2} times that amount.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BUCKET.title: Bucket
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BUCKET.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. At the start of next turn, gain {Block:diff()} Block. Apply {Weak:diff()} Weak to all units.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_NO_MORE_FALCHION.desc: Spend all [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold]. Add {IfUpgraded:show:Steel Chamber+|Steel Chamber} to your hand; its hit count equals the Iron Ingot spent.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STEEL_CHAMBER.title: Steel Chamber
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STEEL_CHAMBER.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits} times. Return this card to your hand.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SHIELD.title: Shield
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SHIELD.description: Choose a character to gain {Dex:diff()} Dexterity this turn.{IfUpgraded:show: You cannot play this card again this turn.| You cannot play this card again this turn or next turn.}{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_AUTO_CRAFTER.title: Auto Crafter
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_AUTO_CRAFTER.descript: At the start of your turn, [gold]Craft[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PAYBACK_TIME.title: Payback Time
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PAYBACK_TIME.descript:
Deal {CalculationBase:diff()} damage. This combat, for each [gold]Material[/gold] you have gained, deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage total)|}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BATCH_CRAFT.title: Batch Craft
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BATCH_CRAFT.descripti: [gold]Craft[/gold]. Gain [blue]X[/blue]{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} copies of the crafted card.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_KALEIDOSCOPE_POT.desc: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Choose {Transform:diff()} cards in your hand to [gold]change[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HAMMER_STRIKE.title: Hammer Slam
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HAMMER_STRIKE.descrip: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. [gold]Strength[/gold] damage bonuses are multiplied by {Multiplier:diff()}. Each turn this card is Retained, its cost is reduced by 1.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_QUICK_ATTACK.title: Quick Attack
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_NETHERITE_CHEST_PLATE:
Gain {Plating:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
Double the Block you gain from [gold]Plating[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HIGHLY_FOCUSED.title: Highly Focused
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HIGHLY_FOCUSED.descri: This turn, double your current Strength.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SWEET_DREAM.title: Sweet Dream
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SWEET_DREAM.descripti: Shuffle all cards from your hand into your draw pile, then draw that many cards.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Shuffle a [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your draw pile.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GOLDEN_ARMOR.title: Golden Armor
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GOLDEN_ARMOR.descript: Gain {Buffer:diff()} [gold]Buffer[/gold] and 1 [gold]Artifact[/gold]. When you lose Buffer, heal HP equal to the damage you would have taken.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_RESTOCK_UPGRADE.title: Refined Backpack: Restock Upgrade
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_RESTOCK_UPGRADE.descr: Grants your [gold]Sophisticated Backpack[/gold] an extra effect: at the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards. Can only be crafted once.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FEEDING_UPGRADE.title: Refined Backpack: Feeding Upgrade
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_FEEDING_UPGRADE.descr: Grants your [gold]Sophisticated Backpack[/gold] an extra effect: at the start of each turn, gain 1 Regeneration. Can only be crafted once.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SMELTING_UPGRADE.desc: Grants your [gold]Sophisticated Backpack[/gold] an extra effect: at the start of each turn, gain 1 [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold]. Can only be crafted once.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CRAFT_UPGRADE.title: Refined Backpack: Crafting Upgrade
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_CRAFT_UPGRADE.descrip: Grants your [gold]Sophisticated Backpack[/gold] an extra effect: every 2 [gold]Craft[/gold](s), you [gold]Craft[/gold] 1 additional time. Can only be crafted once.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_STONECUTTER_UPGRADE.d: Grants your [gold]Sophisticated Backpack[/gold] an extra effect: every 3 turns, your [gold]Cobblestone[/gold] is doubled. Can only be crafted once.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SAVINGS_UPGRADE.title: Refined Backpack: Savings Upgrade
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SAVINGS_UPGRADE.descr: Grants your [gold]Sophisticated Backpack[/gold] an extra effect: at the end of combat, gain 15 additional Gold. Can only be crafted once.{CraftRecipeSuffix}
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_WIND_CRANK.title: Wind Crank
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_REDEMPTION_STRIKE.des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Heal all characters for {Heal:diff()} HP.
If any enemy intends to attack, gain {Dex:diff()} Dexterity this turn.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_RECUPERATE.title: Recuperate
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_RECUPERATE.descriptio: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Discard all Attack cards in your hand{IfUpgraded:show:, as well as Curse, Quest, and Status cards|}.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SPIRIT_FOX_FORM.title: Spirit Fox Form
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SPIRIT_FOX_FORM.descr: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], apply {Slow:diff()} [gold]Slow[/gold] to the target.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GETTING_WOOD.title: Getting Wood
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_GETTING_WOOD.descript: Gain {Wood:diff()} [gold]Plank[/gold]. Deal damage equal to the [gold]Plank[/gold] gained.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SCRATCH.title: Scratch
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MAGIC_MISSILE.title: Magic Missile
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MAGIC_MISSILE.descrip:
Cause an enemy to lose {Damage:diff()} HP twice.
Gain {ChantPower:diff()} [gold]Chant[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BARRIER_WAVE.title: Barrier Wave
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_BARRIER_WAVE.descript:
Cause ALL enemies to lose {Damage:diff()} HP. Gain {ChantBlock:diff()} Block.
Gain {ChantPower:diff()} [gold]Chant[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_INTERMITTENT_CHANTING: Gain 1 [gold]Weak[/gold]. Whenever you cause an enemy to lose HP, that enemy gains [blue]1[/blue] Block and you gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] Block.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EXPLOSION_MAGIC.title: Explosion Magic
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EXPLOSION_MAGIC.descr: Apply {Burn:diff()} [gold]Burning[/gold] to ALL enemies, repeated {Hits:diff()} times. Lose 3 [gold]Chant[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EROSION.title: Erosion
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_EROSION.description:
Apply {Stacks:diff()} [gold]Disintegration[/gold] to an enemy. ALL enemies with [gold]Disintegration[/gold] lose HP equal to their stacks.
Gain {ChantPower:diff()} [gold]Chant[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MEMORY.title: Memory
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_MEMORY.description: At the start of your turn, add a copy of the last [gold]Skill[/gold] you played last turn to your hand. It gains [gold]Exhaust[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: and [gold]Retain[/gold]|}.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_OTHERWORLD_CROSSING.d: At the start of each turn, choose a card in your hand. Add a copy of it to your hand with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PETRIFICATION_SPELL.d:
Gain {Stones:diff()} [gold]Cobblestone[/gold]. ALL enemies lose HP equal to the [gold]Cobblestone[/gold] you gained this turn.
Gain {ChantPower:diff()} [gold]Chant[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LAUNCH_PLATFORM.title: Launch Platform
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LAUNCH_PLATFORM.descr: The first time you spend [gold]Stress[/gold] each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PLANNING_EXPERT.title: Planning Expert
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_PLANNING_EXPERT.descr: At end of turn, discarded [gold]Skill[/gold] cards gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LIBERATION.title: Liberation
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LIBERATION.descriptio: At end of turn, trigger each [gold]Retained[/gold] card in your hand.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_NETHERITE_SWORD.title: Netherite Sword
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_NETHERITE_SWORD.descr: Play all [gold]Sword[/gold] cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: after upgrading them|}.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HOARDING_HABIT.title: Hoarding Habit
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_HOARDING_HABIT.descri: Gain {Wood:diff()} [gold]Plank[/gold] and {Stone:diff()} [gold]Cobblestone[/gold]. At the start of next turn, gain {NextTurnMaterial:diff()} [gold]Plank[/gold] and {NextTurnMaterial:diff()} [gold]Cobblestone[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LOGISTICS.title: Logistics
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LOGISTICS.description: Choose {IfUpgraded:show:any|a} card in your hand and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it. Add a copy of it to a teammate's hand.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_LOGISTICS_CHOOSE: Choose a card to exhaust and send
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SWEEP.title: Sweep
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_SWEEP.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. If you have no Block, deal damage one additional time.
STS2_WINE_FOX_CARD_OBTAIN_STRESS.title: Obtain Stress
